title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Mastery Check
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a production skill and MCP integration package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.
Declare skill tool dependencies and provide actionable setup and fallback behavior.
Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure
steps.instruction:
Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: agent ext integration capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

Use a changed quiz case derived from this module: agent ext integration capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.

content.text: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience. Use this as an observable contract: name its preconditions, trace the state or value change, and state what evidence would disprove the result.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Preserve authority, safety, accessibility, traceability, and stakeholder consequences alongside technical correctness.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Use a changed worked example case derived from this module: agent ext integration capstone. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result. A defensible solution applies Integration Defense, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to a production skill and MCP integration package.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: A technically working demo is a complete extension product. This fails the Integration Defense contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.label: Research anchor
content.value: MCP Stable Specification Architecture (2025-06-18 stable) — Controls stable client-host-server architecture, lifecycle, capability negotiation, and primitives.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.

stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: required

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Run the boundary case, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the result because visible output is the highest authority.

options.text: Define the stakeholder decision, quantities, authority, and constraints
Choose and document the smallest defensible model or procedure
Execute the model while preserving inspectable intermediate evidence
Test boundaries and changed cases, communicate limits, and revise

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Integration Defense applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Defend scope, trust, maintainability, context cost, and operator experience.

hints: Name the Integration Defense precondition or invariant that the quiz case must preserve.
